content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://dmsjournal.biomedcentral.com/counter/pdf/10.1186/s13098-023-01234-3", "source_title": "Effect of intermittent fasting on lipid biokinetics in obese and overweight patients with type 2 diabetes mellitus: prospective observational study", "source_type": "journal_article", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "Patients and methods Thirty overweight or obese T2D patients were recruited from the diabetes outpatient clinics at the Specialized Medical...", "direct_quote": "Patients and methods Thirty overweight or obese T2D patients were recruited from the diabetes outpatient clinics at the Specialized Medical Hospital, Mansoura University.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Anthropometric data were measured for participants before and 3 weeks after Ramadan fasting.", "direct_quote": "Anthropometric data were measured for participants before and 3 weeks after Ramadan fasting.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Fasting plasma glucose (FPG), HbA1c, lipid profile, leptin, beta hydroxybutyrate (βHB) and high sensitive CRP levels were measured 1 week...", "direct_quote": "Fasting plasma glucose (FPG), HbA1c, lipid profile, leptin, beta hydroxybutyrate (βHB) and high sensitive CRP levels were measured 1 week before and 3 weeks after Ramadan fasting.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts from Effect of intermittent fasting on lipid biokinetics in obese."}]}
